channel.title: NANN Mahajan, R Pednekar, SR Patil, AA Subramanyam, S Rathi, S Malik, SC Mohite, G Shinde, M Joshi, P Kumbhar, A Tilve, PD Lokhande, SA Srivastava | PlatCOVID

image.title: NANN Mahajan, R Pednekar, SR Patil, AA Subramanyam, S Rathi, S Malik, SC Mohite, G Shinde, M Joshi, P Kumbhar, A Tilve, PD Lokhande, SA Srivastava

item.title: Preparedness, administrative challenges for establishing obstetric services, and experience of delivering over 400 women at a tertiary care COVID-19 hospital in India.
